one_line_verdict: A must-see theatrical experience for sci-fi and drama fans — Ryan Gosling's grounded performance anchors a visually stunning, emotionally rich space epic that demands the big screen.
english_note: Contains moderate scientific jargon and technical dialogue; conversational English otherwise clear and natural.
credits_detail: Speculative: Likely features a mid-credits scene given the directors' (Lord & Miller) track record — watch through at least the mid-credits roll.
one_line_summary: One man, one mission, one impossible friendship — the space epic of the year.
